name: torso_frame_move_to_pregrasp
description: Move the TCP to a torso-frame pregrasp waypoint.

parameters.pregrasp_offset_torso: Required [x, y, z] offset from grasp pose to pregrasp pose
parameters.pregrasp_offset_x: Required x offset from grasp pose if pregrasp_offset_torso is not used
parameters.pregrasp_offset_y: Required y offset from grasp pose if pregrasp_offset_torso is not used
parameters.pregrasp_offset_z: Required z offset from grasp pose if pregrasp_offset_torso is not used
